payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Close-up partial view of a dark brown leather couch arm and adjacent seat cushion with visible stitched seams, padded rectangular arm shape, surface creasing and glossy highlights indicating worn but intact upholstery; crop is edge-cut and photographed at close range (≈0.6 m from camera).
